title: alangium villosum subsp. bussyanum
intro: Alangium villosum subsp. bussyanum, also known as the 'Bussy's alangium', is a plant species belonging to the Alangiaceae family, native to Australia and New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Alangium villosum subsp. bussyanum is often prepared as a herbal remedy, typically in the form of a decoction or infusion, and may be used to treat various ailments.
